raw_entries.text: Match ends, Netherlands 1(2), Morocco 1(3).
Goal! Netherlands 1(2), Morocco 1(3). Ismael Saibari (Morocco) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Penalty Shootout ends, Netherlands 1(2), Morocco 1(3).
Penalty saved. Crysencio Summerville (Netherlands) right footed shot saved in the top left corner by Yassine Bounou (Morocco).

PEN
Penalty missed. Quinten Timber (Netherlands) right footed shot is close, but misses to the left.
Penalty missed! Still Netherlands 1(2), Morocco 1(2). Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) hits the left post with a right footed shot.
Goal! Netherlands 1(2), Morocco 1(2). Chemsdine Talbi (Morocco) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the top right corner.
Goal! Netherlands 1(2), Morocco 1(1). Wout Weghorst (Netherlands) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the top left corner.
Goal! Netherlands 1(1), Morocco 1(1). Soufiane Rahimi (Morocco) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.

Goal! Netherlands 1(1), Morocco 1. Teun Koopmeiners (Netherlands) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the bottom right corner.
